title: 『オマケはときに心を繋ぐものである』

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, I'm waiting outside for Sakura Chiyono
O to finish shopping at a convenience store.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Sorry for the wait! Thanks for coming with me
today.
choice_data_list: Did you get what you were looking for?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Yep! I got an animal sticker!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! My little sister and I have been collecting
them recently.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
They come free with certain drinks and have
educational animal trivia facts on them! But best
of all, the designs are really cute!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
My older brother has been helping us collect
them, so we've got almost all of them now!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
All we're missing is the pronghorn antelope, the
dolphin, and the cheetah. I hope I get one of
them this time.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Sakura Chiyono O quickly opens the package in
her hand and pulls out a sticker from it.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Oh, it's the pronghorn antelope! Yay! Look how
cool it is!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Let's see... "The pronghorn antelope has
extraordinary stamina. It can't outrun a cheetah in
short sprints, but over long distances, it's the
clear winner!"

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
I see. It make sense that some animals are more
suited for short distances, while others are better
at long distances.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
It reminds me of the saying, cherry blossoms
thrive in the mountains, and seaweed in the sea.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Check out those horns, too. I wish I could see how
they look in real life.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Oh! How about we go to see them together
sometime?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. I hope there are antelopes at the zoo near
us.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
At any rate, Sakura Chiyono O is over the moon
after getting a sticker she wanted.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Oh, it's the dolphin! Aw, it's so cute!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
The fun fact says, "Dolphins are aquatic mammals
that live in groups. They're fast swimmers and are
rumored to be very intelligent!"

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Interesting. Actually, I remember going to an
aquarium to see a dolphin show with my family
when I was a kid.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
It was super cool. They jumped so high up, it
looked like they were flying!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
So they're fast swimmers and smart, huh? They're
like that saying! All-rounders make great
entertainers!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Ding!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Oh, sorry. Give me just a second...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Hello? What's up? Okay...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Huh?!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
T-T-Trainer, you won't believe it! That was my
sister just now...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
And she said she just got a dolphin sticker right
now!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
This is unbelievable! It's like my proverb linked us
together! Dolphins really are great entertainers!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm not quite sure why, but Sakura Chiyono O is
especially motivated by the dolphin sticker and
throws herself into her training that day.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Oh, it's the cheetah! This is great. My sister
wanted this one.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
"The cheetah's acceleration force is unrivaled and
it's a champion at sprints. With a great sense of
style, the cheetah is one cool cat!"

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
You do see lots of videos of cheetahs running at
incredible speeds, huh.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
If I could run that fast on the final stretch,
nobody would stand a chance against me.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Like they say, the shortest way to victory is
having a great weapon!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Ding, ding, ding! ♪

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Huh? My siblings are blowing up our group LANE
chat. I wonder what's up?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Huh?!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
They said they just got the pronghorn antelope
and dolphin stickers!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Wait, could it be? That means we have the full
set! This is amazing!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
I have to let them know right away! Um... "I
actually just got the cheetah..."

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Soon after sending the message, Sakura Chiyono
O gets a phone call from her little sister, who is
extremely excited.
